channel.title: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD)

item.title: Can Spain’s teamwork overcome Lionel Messi’s genius?
item.description: The World Cup finalists are strikingly different teams

item.title: Can Spain’s teamwork overcome Lionel Messi’s genius?
item.description: The World Cup finalists are strikingly different teams

item.title: Checks and Balance newsletter: Make America worse at sports
item.description: Charlotte Howard, our US editor, on why the fantasy of athletic greatness has become a plague on American life

item.title: China, the US, and Nuclear Energy Geopolitics in Southeast Asia
item.description: Nuclear reactor exports are becoming an increasingly important arena of strategic competition.
